name: plan-build-review-repair
description: Conceptual flow: plan, build, review, detect errors, RCA/fix when needed, validate, then commit and push if clean.

chain.label: Create execution plan
chain.task: Create a concise execution plan for the requested work. Keep it implementation-ready and include expected build/review validation points. Task: {task}

chain.label: Implement/build according to plan
Review build result and current diff
Extract pass/fail issue report

parallel.label: RCA: {issue.title}

chain.label: Fix issues with bounded repair loop
Re-build and re-review after fixes
Commit and push if clean
